pros: SenseNova LLMs plus autonomous driving stack

review.verdict: A Chinese CV heavyweight worth considering only if you are in APAC and comfortable with the sanctions exposure.
review.best_for: APAC firms needing industrial-grade vision and autonomous driving models
review.not_for: Western companies subject to US export controls or ethics reviews
